name: EOA – Post-Event Follow-up Dispatch (N8N-native fallback)
description: N8N-native alternative to the Next.js /api/events/[id]/followup route. Accepts a simple { eventId } payload, fetches attendees from Supabase, segments them using the same logic as the Next.js route, and fires per-segment sequence webhooks with the canonical payload format. Use this for: manual triggers from N8N UI, testing sequences without the web app running, or scheduled post-event dispatch. The Next.js route is the primary trigger; this workflow is a fallback. Dispatch webhook: POST /eoa-post-event-dispatch with { eventId }.
notes: Primary trigger is Next.js /api/events/[id]/followup (POST with x-admin-secret header). Use this workflow for manual/fallback dispatch only.

nodes.name: Dispatch Webhook
nodes.notes: Manual fallback trigger. Expects: { eventId: 'uuid' }. Primary trigger is the Next.js /api/events/[id]/followup route.
